column2: # Update the average_distribution for renaming engagement levels and conditions
eng_level = factor(eng_level, levels = c("EC", "AL", "PL")),  # Reorder engagement levels
condition = factor(condition, levels = c("Human-Human", "Human-Robot")),  # Ensure correct order
# Remove rows with NA values in the relevant columns
ggplot(average_distribution, aes(x = eng_level, y = avg_percentage, color = condition)) +
# Apply conditional y-limits for the first two event types
facet_wrap(~ event_type, ncol = 2, scales = "free") +  # Change to 3x2 layout
